title: Mine and Slash
description: Turn Minecraft into a hack and slash looter!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edb12a035de9c9b791de39957d9e2e64707fa1a7.png)

![New Content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/158143a2c63372c2ed3157782a1f29247c8dbdd8_0.webp)

Welcome to Mine and Slash, a mod that changes minecraft into a hack and slash looter!  

If you like MMORPGs and Looter games like Diablo/POE, then this is probably a mod for you.

Mine and Slash on its own adds all the progression mechanics you ever wanted:
- Diablo-like gear progression
- Rune Words
- Unique Items
- Affixes
- Chaos Stats
- Set items
- Huge talent tree
- Many spell masteries to mix and match.
- Modifying, salvaging, crafting of loot.
- Endgame - Increasingly difficult tiers of Adventure Maps.
- Highly configurable.       



If you want to play right now, I suggest Craft to Exile 2 Modpack.



Warnings:

- Requies: Forge, Player Animator Mod and Curios API.
- Use a mod for recipes like JEI.
- This mod only supports the latest version, which is currently 1.20.1!
- Not compatible with other Spell mods
- Older versions are playable, but won't receive updates
